allow: Bash(timeout 15 node -e " require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); const SolaceClient = require\('./src/solace-client'\); const { parseFixmMessage } = require\('./src/fixm-parser'\); const { XMLParser } = require\('fast-xml-parser'\); const parser = new XMLParser\({ ignoreAttributes: false, attributeNamePrefix: '@_', removeNSPrefix: true }\); const fdps = new SolaceClient\({ host: process.env.FDPS_HOST, vpn: process.env.FDPS_VPN, username: process.env.FDPS_USERNAME, password: process.env.FDPS_PASSWORD, queue: process.env.FDPS_QUEUE }\); const sources = new Set\(\); let count = 0; fdps.on\('message', \(payload\) => { if \(typeof payload !== 'string' || count > 200\) return; const parsed = parser.parse\(payload\); const msg = parsed.MessageCollection?.message; const flight = Array.isArray\(msg\) ? msg[0]?.flight : msg?.flight; if \(flight\) { const src = flight['@_source'] || '?'; const sys = flight['@_system'] || '?'; const centre = flight['@_centre'] || '?'; const key = src + '|' + sys + '|' + centre; if \(!sources.has\(key\)\) { sources.add\(key\); console.log\('source:', src, 'system:', sys, 'centre:', centre\); } count++; } }\); fdps.connect\(\); setTimeout\(\(\) => process.exit\(0\), 12000\); ")
